cn: 我們先迴向給所有眾生
en: First, let us dedicate the merits to all sentient beings.

cn: 今天我來講解這個法的修持重點
en: Today I will explain the key point of this practice.

cn: 請大家一心敬禮根本傳承上師
en: Please wholeheartedly pay homage to the Root Guru.

cn: 這是一個非常殊勝的法會
en: This is a very auspicious Dharma ceremony.

cn: 真佛密法重視傳承與實修
en: True Buddha Tantric practice places importance on lineage and actual practice.
Next, we will do the dedication of merits.
Grand Master is giving today's Dharma teaching.
We pray for the blessing of Golden Mother.
We pray for the blessing of Drashi Lhamo.

cn: 佛母大孔雀明王護摩法會
